mapper.sql: id, source_name, status, total_words, processed_words, imported_words, updated_words, skipped_words, failed_words, refresh_existing, batch_size, started_at, finished_at, created_by_user_id, error_message, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO public_catalog_import_items(job_id, word, status) VALUES
(#{jobId}, #{word}, 'PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT FROM public_catalog_import_jobs WHERE id = #{jobId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM public_catalog_import_jobs WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING') ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE public_catalog_import_jobs SET status = 'RUNNING', started_at = COALESCE(started_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), finished_at = NULL, error_message = NULL WHERE id = #{jobId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING', 'COMPLETED', 'FAILED')
mapper.select: SELECT id, job_id, word, attempt_count FROM public_catalog_import_items WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE public_catalog_import_items SET status = 'PENDING' WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'RUNNING'
UPDATE public_catalog_import_items SET status = 'RUNNING', attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, last_error = NULL WHERE id = #{itemId} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE public_catalog_import_items SET status = #{status}, entry_id = #{entryId}, has_phonetic = 1, has_meaning_cn = 1, has_example = 1, has_category = 1, has_audio = 1, has_definition = 1, has_frequency = 1, last_error = NULL WHERE id = #{itemId}
UPDATE public_catalog_import_items SET status = 'SKIPPED', entry_id = #{entryId}, last_error = NULL WHERE id = #{itemId}

UPDATE public_catalog_import_jobs j SET processed_words = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public_catalog_import_items i WHERE i.job_id = j.id AND i.status IN ('IMPORTED', 'UPDATED', 'SKIPPED', 'FAILED') ), imported_words = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public_catalog_import_items i WHERE i.job_id = j.id AND i.status = 'IMPORTED' ), updated_words = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public_catalog_import_items i WHERE i.job_id = j.id AND i.status = 'UPDATED' ), skipped_words = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public_catalog_import_items i WHERE i.job_id = j.id AND i.status = 'SKIPPED' ), failed_words = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public_catalog_import_items i WHERE i.job_id = j.id AND i.status = 'FAILED' ) WHERE j.id = #{jobId}

UPDATE public_catalog_import_jobs j SET status = 'COMPLETED', finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE j.id = #{jobId} AND j.status = 'RUNNING' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM public_catalog_import_items i WHERE i.job_id = j.id AND i.status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING') )
UPDATE public_catalog_import_jobs SET status = 'CANCELLED', finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{jobId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING')
UPDATE public_catalog_import_items SET status = 'PENDING', last_error = NULL WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'FAILED'
